context.setupNotes: Deliver the smallest SDD-004 evidence loop slice. Use agent-harness in deliver mode as adversarial taste/process pressure before implementation. Keep scope to document reading, authored evidence anchors, notifications, structured Sakens fakta canvas, and one Arbeidshypotese cluster.
designDecisions: First proof uses three documents and one hypothesis cluster, not the whole eventual case.
Facts auto-file to domains/questions; player interprets through system-authored provisional Arbeidshypotese notes.
No SDD-005/006 simulation answer yet; feedback is notification and evidence-canvas formation only.
Sakens fakta is a separate Blake Manor-like structured/read-only evidence canvas, not a persistent sidebar or freeform editor.
Borrow case_session_spike_v3 visual/content style, including highlighter-yellow after lift; do not pre-highlight answers.

tasks.title: Run SDD-004 agent-harness deliver pass
tasks.description: Update/run the design-lab agent-harness roles against SDD-004 and capture planner/generator/evaluator artifacts focused on player-facing taste risks.
steps: Adapt role scripts from stale SDD-002 Slice A to SDD-004 Desk Evidence Loop
Inspect report/artifacts and summarize PASS/PIVOT/REJECT guidance
tasks.verification: A .harness run exists with role IO, report.html, and evaluator verdict targeting SDD-004 rather than SDD-002.
progressNotes: RUN-013 produced expected PIVOT checklist; RUN-015 later passed after implementation. report: .harness/runs/RUN-015/report.html

tasks.title: Implement document evidence loop slice
tasks.description: Build the three-document Desk Evidence Loop with click-to-lift, delayed affordance, highlighter collected state, notifications, structured Sakens fakta canvas, and one economy hypothesis cluster.
steps: Author three document records and evidence anchors
Add evidence/hypothesis state and threshold logic
Implement document viewer interactions and notifications
tasks.verification: Focused tests and browser/smoke checks prove facts lift, notifications appear, hypothesis unlocks only after threshold, and evidence canvas shows facts/hypothesis.
progressNotes: Implemented src/content/evidenceDesk.ts, evidence/hypothesis store state, DeskEvidenceLoop UI, notifications, Sakens fakta canvas, and threshold-gated Arbeidshypotese.

tasks.title: Playtest verdict against SDD-004 questions
tasks.description: Run a local browser/playtest check and answer the SDD-004 verdict questions from actual interaction.
steps: Exercise the three-document flow manually or via Playwright smoke
Record whether the loop feels like building a municipal case file
tasks.verification: A concrete verdict note exists with evidence from tool/browser output and any remaining risks.
progressNotes: Verified npm test, npm run build, agent-harness RUN-015 PASS, and browser smoke at http://127.0.0.1:5173.
